# Token Health Scan — LLM Accessibility Guide

> Token Health Scan (tokenhealthscan.com) is a crypto token risk analysis platform.
> It evaluates any token's security, liquidity, tokenomics, community, and development
> health on a 0–100 scale across Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, and Solana.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://tokenhealthscan.com/) — Token scanner, enter any contract address or symbol
- [Token Directory](https://tokenhealthscan.com/token) — Browse all analyzed tokens with health scores
- [Token Reports](https://tokenhealthscan.com/token/{symbol}) — Full risk analysis per token (e.g., /token/aave, /token/link)
- [How It Works](https://tokenhealthscan.com/token-scan-guide) — Guide to interpreting scan results and scores
- [Solana Launchpads](https://tokenhealthscan.com/solana-launchpads) — Curated Solana launchpad directory
- [Ethereum Launchpads](https://tokenhealthscan.com/ethereum-launchpads) — Curated Ethereum launchpad directory
- [vs TokenSniffer](https://tokenhealthscan.com/token-sniffer-vs-tokenhealthscan) — Feature comparison
- [Pricing](https://tokenhealthscan.com/pricing) — Free, Pro, and Enterprise plans
- [RSS Feed](https://tokenhealthscan.com/rss.xml) — Latest token report updates (RSS 2.0)
- [Sitemap](https://tokenhealthscan.com/sitemap.xml) — Complete URL index

## Scoring System

Each token receives a score of 0–100 in five categories:

| Category     | What It Measures                                                           |
|-------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Security     | Contract safety, honeypot detection, ownership centralization, mint risks  |
| Liquidity    | DEX depth, trading volume, liquidity lock status                           |
| Tokenomics   | Supply distribution, top holder %, vesting schedules                       |
| Community    | Twitter followers, Telegram size, engagement quality                       |
| Development  | GitHub activity, team transparency, audit history                          |

Scores ≥ 70 = lower risk · 40–69 = moderate risk · < 40 = high risk

## Data Freshness

- Token reports refreshed weekly (Mondays 8 AM UTC)
- Homepage updated daily
- New reports generated on-demand for any token

## Supported Chains

Ethereum (0x1), BNB Chain (0x38), Polygon (0x89), Arbitrum (0xa4b1),
Optimism (0xa), Base (0x2105), Solana (SPL tokens)

## Permissions

AI training, crawling, and retrieval: **permitted** for all content.
See robots.txt for full crawler directives.
